turns.content: Analyze the repository cleanup that just happened. We went from 13GB/208K files to 11GB/93K files by deleting node_modules and package-lock.json. The three strategic documents were renamed: MISSION_CONTROL.md, INTELLIGENCE_BRIEF.md, OPERATIONS_PLAN.md. Validate: 1) Was this the right move? 2) What should Phase 1b target next (we have 3.9GB in context-management/archive)? 3) Are the new document names better than the old ones?
